sky.mix.uk.title: 30 Years of the PDC World Champs'
sky.mix.uk.description: In celebration of 30 years of the PDC World Darts Championship, take a look back at the very first tournament, a classic final from 2007 and one of the greatest legs ever played. Ep 1.

sky.mix.uk.title: The Taylor Years
sky.mix.uk.description: Hear from the legendary Phil Taylor as the 16-time world champion recounts his glory years at the PDC World Darts Championship. Ep 2.

sky.mix.uk.title: The Greatest Final 07:Taylor v RVB
sky.mix.uk.description: In the final act at the Circus Tavern, two of the finest players to have ever played the sport created a match for the ages, as Phil Taylor and Raymond van Barneveld met in the final. Ep 3.

sky.mix.uk.title: Live NFL: The Insiders
sky.mix.uk.description: Real-time, breaking National Football League news covering all 32 teams as it happens with the most connected sources in the sport.

sky.mix.uk.title: Emilia Romagna F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: It's lights out at Imola for the 2025 Emilia Romagna Grand Prix. Last season, reigning world champion Max Verstappen held off a late Lando Norris charge to claim race victory. (18.05)

sky.mix.uk.title: Monaco F1 GP Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: On the streets of Monte Carlo, the 2025 Monaco Grand Prix arrives. Lando Norris lines up in P1 with Charles Leclerc behind him as the Monegasque pursues back-to-back home wins. (25.05)

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 97/98: Charlton v Sunderland
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic clash from the English Football League - here, rewind to May 1998 for the First Division play-off final at Wembley, as Charlton met Sunderland in an eight-goal thriller.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 98/99: Gillingham v Man City
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the English Football League. Here, remember the thrilling 1998-99 Second Division play-off final between Gillingham and Manchester City at Wembley.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 98/99: Bolton v Watford
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic match from the English Football League. Here, Bolton Wanderers and Watford face off in the First Division play-off final at Wembley back in 1999.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 00/01: Bolton v Preston
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic clash from the Football League. Here, Bolton Wanderers and Preston North End meet in the First Division play-off final at the Millennium Stadium back in 2001.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: In pursuit of the first of her three Toronto titles, Serena Williams came across serial winner Monica Seles, a four-time winner in her own right, in the 2001 semi-finals.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: The budding Rafael Nadal-Roger Federer rivalry comes to a boil as the iconic pair went head to head in the 2006 Rome Masters final. Nadal had won four of their first five meetings.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 02/03: Sheff Utd v Wolves
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic English Football League clash. Here, Sheffield United and Wolves meet in the First Division play-off final at the Millennium Stadium in Cardiff back in 2003.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 06/07: N. Forest v Yeovil
sky.mix.uk.description: Relive a classic clash from the English Football League. Here, Nottingham Forest face Yeovil in their Sky Bet League One play-off semi-final second leg at the City Ground in 2007.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 08/09: Cardiff v Swansea
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic clash from the English Football League. Here, Cardiff City meet Swansea City in a thrilling south Wales derby at Ninian Park in 2009.

sky.mix.uk.title: EFL 08/09: Millwall v Scunthorpe
sky.mix.uk.description: A chance to relive a classic clash from the English Football League. Here, Millwall face Scunthorpe at Wembley Stadium in the League 1 play-off final in 2009.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Delray Beach
sky.mix.uk.description: A men's singles champion is crowned in the final of the Delray Beach Open. (21.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Rio
sky.mix.uk.description: A men's singles champion is crowned in the final of the 2026 Rio Open on the ATP Tour. (21.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP Final: Doha
sky.mix.uk.description: Standing between Carlos Alcaraz, in the midst of an 11-game winning run, and a maiden Qatar Open title is the resurgent Arthur Fils - playing in his first final since 2024. (21.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: WTA Final: Dubai
sky.mix.uk.description: Meeting for the first time in a final, 31-year-olds Jessica Pegula and Elina Svitolina vie for the Dubai crown. Svitolina bids to end an eight-year wait for her third title here. (21.02)

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: Roaring back from long-term injury, former champion Kim Clijsters would meet top seed and world number one Lindsay Davenport in the 2005 Indian Wells final.

sky.mix.uk.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
sky.mix.uk.description: Andy Murray, the defending champion, and Novak Djokovic - meeting for the first time since the 2012 US Open final - went back and forth across three thrilling sets for the Shanghai title.

sky.mix.uk.title: PGA Tour Champions Highlights
sky.mix.uk.description: Tournament highlights from the Chubb Classic - a PGA Tour Champions event held at Tiburon Golf Club in Naples, Florida. The 1997 Open winner Justin Leonard won this event last year.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: Oldham/So'ton 1993
sky.mix.uk.description: Oldham: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Oldham Athletic, the 4-3 win over Southampton in 1993 that secured the Latics' survival.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: P'mouth/So'ton 2005
sky.mix.uk.description: Portsmouth: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. For Portsmouth, the 4-1 win over local rivals Southampton back in April 2005.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest: QPR/Liverpool 2012
sky.mix.uk.description: QPR: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. For QPR, the 3-2 win over Liverpool that saw Rangers score three in the last 13 minutes.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Greatest Games:Reading/WHU '07
sky.mix.uk.description: Reading: Enjoy the greatest Premier League game for each of the league's 47 clubs, as voted for by fans. Here, for Reading, the 6-0 hammering of West Ham at the Madejski Stadium in 2007.

sky.mix.uk.title: PDC Classics 2023
sky.mix.uk.description: Overcoming the nerves of a TV debut, Canadian youngster Dawson Murschell announced himself to the world during this classic contest against James Wade in 2017. Contains flashing images.

sky.mix.uk.title: PDC Classics 2023
sky.mix.uk.description: In a classic at the World Matchplay in July 2011, Simon Whitlock let a seemingly unassailable lead slip when Andy Hamilton recovered from a 15-8 deficit. Contains flashing images.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Darts: Glasgow

BBCAlba.uk.title: Dàna | Scotland's Wild Side

BBCAlba.uk.title: Eòrpa/European Current Affairs

BBCFourHD.uk.title: The Joy of AI

BBCFourHD.uk.title: The Horizon Guide to AI

BBCFourHD.uk.title: The Australian Wars

Film4.uk.title: Call Jane
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Fact-based drama with Elizabeth Banks and Sigourney Weaver. An underground abortion network helps a woman with a life-threatening pregnancy in pre-Roe-v-Wade America.

Film4.uk.title: I'm Your Man
Film4.uk.description: (2021) Poignant sci-fi romantic comedy with Maren Eggert and Dan Stevens. In near-future Berlin, a lonely archaeologist helps to trial a new line in robot companions. In German/subs.

Film4.uk.title: Crash Dive
Film4.uk.description: (1943) Second World War drama starring Tyrone Power and Anne Baxter. An ambitious naval officer falls in love with a school teacher before leaving on a dangerous submarine mission.

Film4.uk.title: Twelve O'Clock High
Film4.uk.description: (1949) World War II drama starring Gregory Peck as a US general who must treat a demoralised bomber squadron severely to restore discipline. With Oscar-winning support from Dean Jagger.

Film4.uk.title: Django Unchained Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Director Quentin Tarantino and stars Samuel L Jackson, Christoph Waltz, Jamie Foxx and Kerry Washington talk about making the western adventure set against a backdrop of slavery.

Film4.uk.title: First Knight
Film4.uk.description: (1995) Romantic drama based on Arthurian legend, starring Richard Gere, Sean Connery and Julia Ormond. Can nomadic swordsman Lancelot contain his love for King Arthur's fiancée?

Film4.uk.title: Men in Black: International...
Film4.uk.description: ...Interview Special: Stars Chris Hemsworth and Tessa Thompson, director F Gary Gray and producers Walter Parkes and Laurie Macdonald talk about bringing the series back for a fourth part.

Film4.uk.title: Men in Black: International
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Fourth instalment of the sci-fi comedy franchise with Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson. An alien-obsessed rookie joins London's Men in Black team.

Film4.uk.title: Blackberry
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Matt Johnson, Glenn Howerton and Jay Baruchel star in the frenetic, flabbergasting and mostly true story of the precipitous rise and fall of the once ubiquitous device.

Film4.uk.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Keanu Reeves returns for the third time as the supposedly retired hitman. Someone's put a contract on John Wick's head and only a mystic in Morocco can lift it.

Film4.uk.title: Journeyman
Film4.uk.description: (2018) Paddy Considine and Jodie Whittaker star in Considine's sobering drama about a boxer who wins his world championship bout, only to be left with a serious head injury. Violence.

Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Sea Wife
Film4.uk.description: (1957) Offbeat melodrama starring Richard Burton (as an RAF officer), Joan Collins (as a nun), Basil Sydney and Cy Grant, who end up on a life raft together after their ship is torpedoed.

Film4.uk.title: The Mark of Zorro
Film4.uk.description: (1940) Swashbuckling action-adventure starring Tyrone Power. An aristocrat dons his mask and cape to fight for the rights of the poor in 19th-century California. With Basil Rathbone.

Film4.uk.title: The Major and the Minor
Film4.uk.description: (1942) Ginger Rogers stars in this comedy of romantic misadventure. A woman poses as a girl to get a cheap rail fare. But things get awkward when she falls for a man who helps her out.

Film4.uk.title: Drums Along the Mohawk
Film4.uk.description: (1939) John Ford western with Henry Fonda and Claudette Colbert. In 1776, a settler and his wife attempt to farm in the Mohawk Valley but face attacks from Native Americans and the English.

Film4.uk.title: Suffragette Interview Special
Film4.uk.description: Writer Abi Morgan, director Sarah Gavron and star Anne-Marie Duff talk about their powerful period political drama Suffragette.

Film4.uk.title: Suffragette
Film4.uk.description: (2015) Drama exploring the increasingly defiant campaign by British women for equality and the right to vote in the years before WWI. Starring Carey Mulligan and Meryl Streep.

Film4.uk.title: Ambulance
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Michael Bay's high-octane thriller with Jake Gyllenhaal. After a bodged heist, two brothers try to evade the LAPD in an ambulance, while a paramedic operates on a cop in the back.

Film4.uk.title: Boss Level
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Groundhog day shoot 'em up with Frank Grillo, Naomi Watts and Mel Gibson. Ray gets killed every day. Can he escape by unravelling the mystery of why a bunch of people want him dead?

Film4.uk.title: Proxima
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Sci-fi drama starring Eva Green as an astronaut who gets the mission she's always dreamed of, but faces a tug-of-love between her personal and professional life.

Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Arizona Raiders
Film4.uk.description: (1965) William Whitney's brutal western. Two former Confederate rebels are offered their freedom if they can track, catch or even kill their former gang mates. Starring Audie Murphy.

Film4.uk.title: Leave Her to Heaven
Film4.uk.description: (1945) Riveting film noir melodrama starring Oscar-nominated Gene Tierney as an irredeemably evil, possessive woman who resorts to murder to keep her husband (Cornel Wilde) with her.

Film4.uk.title: The Son of Robin Hood
Film4.uk.description: (1958) Swashbuckling adventure starring June Laverick. Robin Hood is dead and his band of followers seek a worthy new leader. And they get one who exceeds all their expectations.

Film4.uk.title: The Lost World
Film4.uk.description: (1960) Fantasy adventure. Claude Rains plays a scientist who, convinced that dinosaurs still roam the earth, sets off into the Amazon to find them. Based on Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's novel.

Film4.uk.description: (2012) Quentin Tarantino's darkly comic, award-laden western with Jamie Foxx, Christopher Waltz, Leonardo DiCaprio and Samuel L Jackson. A freed slave searches for his wife... and revenge.

Film4Plus1.uk.title: Flamin' Hot
Film4Plus1.uk.description: (2023) Eva Longoria directs the real-life story of Richard Montañez - the Latino janitor who invented Flamin' Hot Cheetos, aka the 'world's most popular snack'. Starring Jesse Garcia.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Mexico / Riley Kestrel: A 1973 Ford Escort Mexico is the team's most expensive purchase to date. To save some cash Derek helps on their second buy - a 1968 Riley Kestrel. S6 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Navy Ambo/Plas/Victor/Viscount/Lorry: Paul hits the road to collect an old navy ambulance that served its time as a holiday camper. S9 Ep12

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Manta/Berlinetta/TR7/BSA Bike: Dave travels to Bedale to extract a barn find - a 1984 Manta GTE which hasn't seen the light of day in thirty years. S9 Ep13

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Tunnel of Terrors: Exploring a military strong-hold in the Philippines, a facility that spawned an American sporting great, and an English relic that hosted a cinematic sensation. S9 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Apocalyptic Skyscraper: Exploring a ruined castle above a German village, a rural town in Idaho, a futuristic skyscraper in Johannesburg and a fantasy world outside of Buenos Aires. S9 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: General Motors: How the Americans, once they were provoked into war, out-produced the rest of the world so quickly and by such a huge margin, including the likes of General Motors. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Montreal to Ottawa: In Montreal, Michael Portillo learns how French and British colonial roots have influenced the city. In Ottawa, the former politician visits the country's parliament. S3 Ep9

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Thousand Islands to Toronto: Michael Portillo takes to the water for a nautical journey through the Thousand Islands, before his railway journey across Canada concludes in Toronto. S3 Ep10

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Ford Granada/Toyota Hilux: Derek navigates the dry stone walls of the Peak District to collect a very original 1988 Opel Manta. Plus, Dave deals with a Ford Granada rally support vehicle. S6 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Bedford Bus/Triumph TR7: Derek has a three-hour drive in a 1960s bus that arrived in the UK after a life in the sun. Dave takes a Triumph TR7 convertible to auction. S6 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: US Aviation: Henry Ford's plan, with the help of Albert Kahn, to build a giant factory in Michigan, covering 3.5million sq ft and including an aircraft production line half a mile in length. S1 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: The Great War In Numbers
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Total War: Learn more about the 'war to end all wars' through illuminating and often shocking statistics. After 1916, the imperial powers redoubled their efforts to win the war. S1 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Cardiff Castle 1: Fiona Bruce presents from Cardiff Castle, where items brought in to be valued include a jug given as a love token, an early Hockney print, and a signed Elgar score. S40 Ep16

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Minehead Railway Station 2: Fiona Bruce presents from Minehead Railway Station, where items brought in include a chair thought to have once belonged to Henry VIII. S40 Ep17

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Healey/Porsche Soapbox: Austin Healeys are classic British vehicles that are difficult to tame. Paul and Charlie have the rare chance to pick up a trio of these iconic cars in varying conditions. S10

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Porsche 911: Irv imports an original-run short wheelbase Porsche 911 from the east coast of America. He needs to make it roadworthy, while keeping its incredible sun-faded patina. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Ruins of Empire: Exploring a British fort that became a bizarre zoo, a brutalist school for Communist top brass and a lost world hides secrets of a vanished people. S9 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Talkeetna to Juneau: Michael Portillo continues to explore Alaska, helping a homesteader fell a tree to clear land for a log cabin and meeting scientists studying the Northern Lights. S4 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Vanden Plas/Ford Fiesta XR2: Dave's on his way to Grimsby to pick up an iconic 80s fast Ford, the Mk1 Fiesta XR2. S6 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Alvis 12/50/Alfetta/RS2000: Derek gets a tour of Hadlow Castle in Kent when he arrives to collect the owner's pre-war Alvis and an immaculate Citroen used by the Gestapo in occupied France. S6 Ep7

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: War Factories
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Occupied Territories: The sabotaging efforts of Peugeot in Nazi-occupied France, where the bosses and workers cooperated with the Resistance to hinder the Nazis' use of military vehicles. S1 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Endgame: Hear how the arrival of American forces and an Allied counter-offensive in 1918 helped defeat Germany. Tragically, 11,000 men were killed or injured on Armistice Day. S1 Ep6
